Notes:
(1) Total carrying value of approximately $35.0 billion consists of approximately $0.4 billion of publicly traded and approximately $34.6 billion of non-publicly traded equity exposures.

(2) In accordance with U.S. GAAP, total carrying value includes approximately $0.4 billion of unfunded equity commitments related to qualified affordable housing partnerships, but excludes approximately $4.6 billion of unfunded equity commitments relating to other equity investments.
(3) Effective risk weight for equity exposures to investment funds is a blended risk weight of the investments held by the investment funds.
(4) Unfunded equity commitments are included in the derivation of risk-weighted assets.

(5) Equity exposures within the 300% and 400% risk weight categories were risk-weighted at effective risk weight of 100% due to the aggregate amount not exceeding the threshold for non-significant equity exposures which is 10% of total capital.
(6) Included in the carry value and fair market value is the adjusted carrying value of equity derivatives that is the effective notional principal amount of the exposure.
